zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Mallory於1452年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Sir John Mallory25歲，母親Isabel Hamerton27歲。他和Joan Constable至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1498年7月2日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希 哈洛蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Mallory于1452年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Sir John Mallory25岁，母亲Isabel Hamerton27岁。他和Joan Constable至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1498年7月2日在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希 哈洛蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Mallory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for an unfortunate person, from Old French maloret, maloré, maleuré ‘ill-fortuned, unlucky’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Mallory was born in 1452, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Mallory, was 25 and his mother, Isabel Hamerton, was 27. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Joan Constable. He died on 2 July 1498, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in High Harrogate, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Mallory est né en 1452, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Mallory, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel Hamerton, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Joan Constable. Il est décédé le 2 juillet 1498, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à High Harrogate, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Mallory 1452 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Mallory 25 und seine Mutter Isabel Hamerton 27. Er hatte mit Joan Constable mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Juli 1498 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in High Harrogate, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Mallory è nato il nel 1452 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Mallory, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Hamerton, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Joan Constable. Morì il 2 luglio 1498, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a High Harrogate, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Malloryが1452年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Malloryは25歳，母Isabel Hamertonは27歳であった。彼はJoan Constableとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1498年7月2日に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアヒグ ハーロガトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Mallory(이)가 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Mallory(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Hamerton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Joan Constable(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 7월 2일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 히 해로가트에 묻혔다.

mn.Studley, Hutton,Yorkshire, England, Unit: Sandhutton, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Mallory nasceu em 1452, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Mallory, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Hamerton, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Joan Constable. Ele faleceu em 2 de julho de 1498, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em High Harrogate, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Mallory родился в 1452 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Mallory было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Hamerton, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Joan Constable. Он умер 2 июля 1498 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности хаи харрогэит, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Mallory nació en 1452, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Mallory, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabel Hamerton, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Joan Constable. Murió el 2 de julio de 1498, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en High Harrogate, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
